system.description:
What it does (SRD): The first 10 points of damage from each fire attack or effect are ignored (same pattern as resist energy for fire). This is not immunity: larger hits still deal leftover damage after subtracting 10.

ThirdEra: On this item’s Details tab, resist fire 10 is under Capability grants (energy resistance), not in Mechanical effects. When the creature takes fire damage, apply this reduction together with any other fire resistance or immunity from its traits.
